---
title: "PAM"
author: "Jill Ashey"
date: "2025-08-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(nlme)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(lme4)
```

Read in PAM data 
```{r}
pam <- read_csv("../data/Master_datasheet_pam.csv")
```

Calculate mean and sem 
```{r}
pam_summary <- pam %>%
  group_by(Date, Phenotype, Species, PAM_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_FvFm = mean(Fv_Fm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_FvFm = sd(Fv_Fm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_FvFm = sd(Fv_Fm, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(Fv_Fm))),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

Plot! 
```{r}
# Set levels 
pam_summary$Date <- factor(pam_summary$Date, levels = c("September_2023", "January_2024", "May_2024", "October_2024", "January_2025", "May_2025", "October_2025"))

# Set spp names 
species_labels <- c("Mcap" = "Montipora capitata", "Pcomp" = "Porites compressa")

ggplot(pam_summary, aes(x = Date, y = mean_FvFm, color = Phenotype, group = Phenotype, shape = PAM_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_FvFm - sem_FvFm, ymax = mean_FvFm + sem_FvFm, color = Phenotype),
                width = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +  # color matches points/lines
  facet_wrap(~ Species, 
             labeller = labeller(Species = species_labels)) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Resistant" = "#4b294fff", "Susceptible" = "#f3a17dff")
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +  # bigger base size
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = expression(F[v]/F[m]),
    color = "Phenotype"
  ) +
theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 16),
    #legend.position = c(0.85, 0.83),  # adjust x, y for placement
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = alpha("white", 0.7), color = NA),
    legend.key = element_blank(),    
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16)
  )

## save 
```

Look at normality 
```{r}
hist(pam_long$Fv_Fm)

# Q-Q Plot
qqnorm(pam_long$Fv_Fm)
qqline(pam_long$Fv_Fm, col = "red")

# Shapiro-Wilk Test
shapiro.test(pam_long$Fv_Fm)
```

Data is normal. 

Stats
```{r}
mod_pam <- lmer(Fv_Fm ~ Species * Phenotype * Date + (1 | Colony_ID),
                 data = pam_long,
                 REML = FALSE)
car::Anova(mod_pam, type = 3)
em_date <- emmeans(mod_pam, pairwise ~ Date, adjust = "tukey")
summary(em_date)
```
